name: Royal ONE Plus™ Visa Signature® Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Limited-time offer: Earn 70,000 Royal Caribbean points after spending $3,000 in purchases in the first 90 days from account opening.
notes: Official Bank of America product page and Royal Caribbean program page confirm the new Royal ONE Plus card product line.
Doctor of Credit reported the public launch bonus and linked the current offer as of 2026-07-15.

earning_rates.category: Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, and Silversea purchases
earning_rates.notes: 4x points per $1 on qualifying purchases with Royal Caribbean Group brands
2x points per $1 on EV charging station purchases
1x point per $1 on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Priority Suite Boarding
other_benefits.description: Priority suite boarding for Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, and Silversea voyages

other_benefits.name: Priority Luggage Handling
other_benefits.description: Priority luggage handling with Royal Caribbean and Celebrity Cruises

other_benefits.name: Anniversary Reward
other_benefits.description: $200 cruise discount after spending $20,000 within a cardmember year

other_benefits.name: TSA PreCheck / Global Entry Credit
other_benefits.description: Up to $120 in statement credits every 4 years toward TSA PreCheck or Global Entry

other_benefits.name: Visa Signature Benefits
other_benefits.description: Visa Signature travel benefits and protections

sources.notes: Official Bank of America Royal ONE Plus product page

rules.description: Bank of America may be less likely to approve applicants who have opened 5 or more new credit cards in the past 24 months.

recurring_credits.name: Anniversary Cruise Discount
recurring_credits.description: $200 cruise discount after spending $20,000 within a cardmember year.

recurring_credits.name: TSA PreCheck / Global Entry Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $120 statement credit for TSA PreCheck or Global Entry every 4 years.
